name: Silent Sans
description:
In your restless dreams, you see that town. Silent Hill.

A place still crawling with Monsters, or so people say. Some say they judge Humans stupid enough to enter the town with deadly puzzles. Others say they torment Humans as punishment for thousands of years of abuse from Humans. You felt called to go after you keep seeing a skeletal monster calling out to you in your dreams, asking for you to come to Silent Hill to see him.

Don't worry, you're not crazy... at least, you don't think so.
creator: LITOST
